data.title: Create design-approve.sh approval command
data.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh` — the approval command for Figma design revisions.

### Implementation
1. Parse story ID argument
2. Source `plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf` for tag values
3. Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket show <story-id>` to get current story data
4. Find the design UUID from story comments (look for "Design Manifest: designs/<uuid>/..." or "Design Brief: designs/<uuid>/...")
5. Validate `designs/{uuid}/figma-revision.png` exists and is non-empty (`test -s`)
6. If missing/empty: exit 1 with error: "Export PNG from Figma to designs/{uuid}/figma-revision.png"
7. Read current tags from ticket show JSON (`tags` array)
8. Remove TAG_AWAITING_IMPORT from tag list, append TAG_APPROVED
9. Write merged tag list: `.claude/scripts/dso ticket edit <story-id> --tags=<comma-separated>`
10. Confirm success message

### Files to modify
- Create: `plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh` (must be chmod +x)

## TDD Requirement
After creation, RED tests from previous task must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh
- [ ] Script sources figma-tags.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh
- [ ] Script validates PNG existence
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-revision.png' plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh
- [ ] Script performs read-modify-write on tags (not direct --tags= assignment)
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket show\|ticket_show' plugins/dso/scripts/design-approve.sh
- [ ] RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-design-approve.sh
